# Create a YouTube video about Neo.mjs

Related to: https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/5963 (Please read this ticket first)

It would be highly appreciated if some of you could create YouTube videos about the project, to raise the awareness that it does exist.

Please make sure to create a pull request once done and add the link into the description, to get your hacktoberfest tokens.

Thanks and best regards,
Tobias
